description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a rectangular array of photovoltaic panels mounted on a robust frame. The panels are dark, likely monocrystalline or polycrystalline silicon, and are supported by a metallic structure with visible bracing and a yellow base platform. The base appears to house electrical components, possibly including junction boxes and control units, with some colored elements suggesting wiring or safety markings. The structure is low-profile and designed for ground mounting, with the panels tilted to optimize sunlight capture. The overall design is compact, with the electrical and support systems integrated beneath the panel array for protection and efficiency.
description: A compact ground-mounted solar panel array with a metallic frame and integrated electrical base, featuring dark photovoltaic panels and a yellow platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the solar panel array and the yellow base platform with visible electrical components.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the panel array and the arrangement of the support structure beneath the panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the panels, support bracing, and more of the yellow base with possible cabling or control units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the array and the alignment of the panels on the frame.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 25 degrees, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with an aluminum frame and steel supports
attribute_array_configuration: single linear row of approximately 6 panels
